packageRules.description: Copier template updates (e.g. momokaya-template) must never automerge — a Copier update can leave unresolved <<<<<<< conflict markers in files (see README), and only a human reviewing the PR diff catches that

Copier stores its `gh:`/`gl:` template-source shorthand verbatim in `_src_path`, but Renovate's git-tags datasource passes packageName straight to `git ls-remote` without expanding it the way Copier itself does — rewrite to the real clone URL so the datasource can resolve tags
oisin-ee shared TS7 + ultracite/oxc toolchain — pin exact versions and open a bump PR for each package as it publishes (no weekly lockstep batch)
Resolve private oisin-ee packages from GitHub tags instead of the npm registry
The TS7 preview (typescript rc + tsgo native-preview) and oxfmt are pre-stable; allow Renovate to offer prerelease/dev bumps for them instead of pinning to a stale stable tag
